jd_analysis_result.summary: This role involves working as an Assistant in Nursing (AIN) within a dynamic nursing team at Nepean Private Hospital, providing support in patient care duties and ensuring excellent clinical outcomes. The position requires a commitment to customer service and quality improvement.

skill_evidence.planning: Excellent ability to plan and prioritise work
skill_evidence.flexibility: Flexibility to manage shift work (including, day & night shifts) over 7 days
skill_evidence.certificate iv in health care: Certificate IV in Health Care from an approved training provider

responsibilities: Assist nurses or hospital staff in carrying out patient care duties
Work as part of the health care team
Practice in accordance with state legislation and within the designated scope of practice parameters
